title: Consensual urgent slot swap protocol
content:
## When to initiate a swap

Triggered when an urgent patient cannot be placed within the safe wait window and no reserved slot is available.

## Steps
1. Rank displacement candidates via research agent — **vulnerable patients are never eligible**.
2. Propose swap to up to **3** candidates' personal agents.
3. Wait for explicit **accept** — timeout counts as decline (demo: 60s; production: 2h).
4. On accept: atomic swap both bookings and confirm both parties.
5. If all decline: try overflow to sibling practice, then regular ladder.

## Consent is absolute
A swap NEVER happens without explicit patient accept. Calendar conflicts may auto-decline before bothering the patient.
